# TALE — External Baseline

**Paper:** "Token-Budget-Aware LLM Reasoning"

**Official code:** https://github.com/ChenWu98/TALE

## Setup

When ready to integrate:

```bash
cd external/tale
git clone https://github.com/ChenWu98/TALE .repo
# follow their install instructions
```

The wrapper at `src/baselines/external/tale_wrapper.py` will call into this code.

## Status

Placeholder only. Integration not yet started.
